reason: Verified that agent QA-20260331-223158-nhsy correctly responds with "4" to the math question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked on "QA-20260331-223158-nhsy" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened with status "idle"
Verified agent status - Status displayed as "idle" which meets the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input field - Text successfully entered in the input field
Clicked send button - Message was sent and conversation switched to chat view, agent status changed to "working", session "Math Question with QA Agent" was created
Waited for response - Agent responded in approximately 2 seconds (well within the 3-minute timeout)
Verified response contains "4" - Response displays "4" as the answer to the math question, agent status returned to "idle"
